text:
Library of Medicine’s RxNorm Concept Unique 
Identifiers (RXCUIs). The same formulary may be used by more than one plan benefit package (PBP) 
within a contract. 

SHORT NAME: FORMULARY_ID 

LONG NAME: FORMULARY_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: PDE and CMS HPMS (derived) 

VALUES: 8-digit numeric value 

COMMENT: Researchers interested in linking the Utilization Management (UM) variables (tier, step therapy, 
quantity limits, and prior authorization) to the PDE data will need to link the
